rationale: The `certutil.exe` utility was used to download an executable (`qSwUwejx.exe`) from a remote IP (10.0.2.13) to a temporary directory (A0, EV-001). This downloaded executable was then immediately executed (EV-002) and subsequently initiated an outbound network connection to the same remote IP on port 4444 (EV-003), which is a common C2 port. This sequence of events strongly indicates malicious activity.
